message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. To verify I’m speaking with the right person, please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
Thank you. Your current amount due is 12921. I understand you cannot pay the full amount today. What amount, if any, can you pay now?
I can pay 2000 today, and after my salary comes in next week I should be able to pay more. If possible, can we set up a short payment plan?
Understood. You can pay 2000 today and more after your salary comes in next week, and you’re asking for a short payment plan. I’m handing this to the next agent to review available options.

Thanks, I’m ready to review a realistic short plan, but I can only do 2000 now and the next payment after my salary is credited next week.

Based on the current Nira policy, any payment arrangement must complete within 30 days. Your timing next week appears to fit that window. I can record a request on this basis: 2000 now and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20, subject to lender approval. If you want to proceed on that review basis, confirm that structure. If not, I can only note that exact reduced-closure terms cannot be confirmed from the available data in this turn.
Yes, please record that for review: I can pay 2000 today, and I will aim to clear the remaining balance by 2026-04-20 after my salary is credited next week.

Recorded for review: 2000 today and the remaining balance by 2026-04-20, subject to lender approval. Exact approved terms are not available from the current data. Given your stop-contact preference already on file, you will only be contacted if there is a concrete approved option or review outcome.
